title: pavetta oligantha
intro: Pavetta oligantha is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the "red bush" due to its bright red foliage. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Pavetta oligantha include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infused in hot water to release its active compounds, and can also be used in the form of powder or extract for various herbal preparations.
